channel.title: admin on Yongcheng Jing
channel.description: Recent content in admin on Yongcheng Jing

item.description: I am currently a research intern at the Department of Computer Vision Technology (VIS), Baidu Inc. Prior to that, I received my MS in Computer Science at the Microsoft Visual Perception Laboratory (VIPA) of Zhejiang University (ZJU) and Alibaba-Zhejiang University Joint Research Institute of Frontier Technologies (AZFT), fortunately advised by Prof. Mingli Song and Prof. Yizhou Yu. I will become a PhD student at the University of Sydney, advised by Prof.
